title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six core skills for maximizing Claude-based projects: web scraping, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement, collaborative decision-making, user testing, and shipping compound engineering solutions. He demonstrates the workflow through building a personal fitness trainer project, emphasizing methodical system design.
